name: HTTP Redirect, Product ID Migration, And Soft-404 Remediation
decision: R-4 HTTP route policy is implemented and verified locally in the Pages function surface. Live production still serves the old SPA fallback behavior and remains blocked until the updated function/build is deployed and hosting provider readback is available.

implemented.summary: Adds HTTP-level route policy for legacy redirects, trailing-slash redirects, product identifier redirects, protected-route 404s, generated service allowlisting, and unknown-route 404s.

Adds regression coverage for legacy redirects, product UUID/GTIN redirects, canonical product routes, generated service routes, invalid service/product routes, protected routes, and soft-404 candidates.

soft404Remediation.protectedRoutes: HTTP 404 with X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow, noarchive and Cache-Control: no-store

allowedPublicRoutes.staticAssets: robots, sitemaps, product sitemap children, merchant feed, manifest, service worker, icons, and Vite assets
allowedPublicRoutes.spaRoutes: homepage, locale home, service hubs, service details, generated service detail IDs, catalog hubs, product detail routes, local/contact/about/legal/trust pages, and checkout utility routes

providerBlocker.finding: The local function can be verified with a mocked Supabase REST response and database sample, but production cannot be changed or authenticated-readback verified until provider metadata and secrets are supplied through the project wrapper/Keychain workflow.

verification.command: /Users/chandler/.codex/skills/distill-heavy-output/scripts/distill_cmd.sh "Run the Mitra Auto production build after R-4 route function changes. Return exactly: status passed/failed, generated output directory, warnings grouped by tool/file, and fatal errors. Do not include routine Vite transform progress." -- npm run build
live R-4 curl matrix for /shop, /palvelut/dpf-pesu, product UUID, canonical product slug, unknown product, /contact, random invalid route, and /cms

nextTask: R-5 - Checkout URL, canonical, and deployed Paytrail parity
